---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Yanhao Wang - Home"
---

<br>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" type="text/css">

<div style="text-align: center"><span style="color:Navy; font-size: 23pt; font-family:'Georgia'" ><b>Yanhao Wang</b></span> &nbsp;&nbsp; <span style="color:Black; font-size: 19pt; font-family:STFangsong" >王<b>彦皓</b></span> <a href="https://www.chinesenamesinenglish.com/wiki/Yanhao" style="color:rgb(128,139,150)"> /jen-haʊ/ </a></div>

<br>

<img src="images/KSB_YanhaoWang_2018Fall_compact.jpg" style="width:31%; border:1px solid; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 50px" align="left">


Welcome to my website!

I'm a PhD candidate at the Department of [Business Economics and Public Policy](https://kelley.iu.edu/faculty-research/departments/business-economics-public-policy/index.cshtml), [Kelley School of Business](https://kelley.iu.edu/), [Indiana University](https://indiana.edu/).

<!-- I earned my Bachelor degree in Finance and Master's degree in Economics from [Antai College of Economics and Management](http://www.acem.sjtu.edu.cn/), [Shanghai Jiao Tong University](https://www.sjtu.edu.cn/). I was also an exchange student at [Smith School of Business](https://smith.queensu.ca/index.php), [Queen's University](https://www.queensu.ca/). -->

My research interests span a variety of topics in health economics and industrial organization, with a particular focus on provider behavior, healthcare finance, and banking competition. 

I'm on the 2023--2024 job market. You can reach me by [yw113@iu.edu](yw113@iu.edu).

Here is my [<span style="font-weight:bold">CV</span>](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jAvFR8tATC9fl211JrZrL0yDJPOq3Cc6/view?usp=sharing).
